items.q: When will The Jeffersonian be ready?
items.a: The restoration is expected to welcome its first residents in fall 2026. Reach out to join the interest list and be among the first to know when leasing opens for your preferred floor plan.

items.q: What kinds of apartments are available?
items.a: There are 25 apartments across 14 distinct floor-plan configurations, ranging from efficiency studios of about 580 square feet to three-bedroom homes up to 1,590 square feet. Many feature lofted layouts and preserved historic details.
Yes. At least five of the apartments are reserved as income-qualified homes for low-to-moderate income residents. Contact us to learn about eligibility.
All four levels are served by an elevator. Contact us to discuss specific accessibility needs and which homes best suit them.
At 203 W Harrison Street in Jefferson, Iowa — just steps from downtown, the historic square, and the Mahanay Bell Tower.

items.q: How do I apply or get more information?
items.a: Use the contact form on this page or email 203WHarrison@gmail.com. We'll follow up with availability, pricing, and next steps.
